executives.name: Jonathan Evans
executives.background: Mr. Evans has more than 20 years of operations and general management experience across the chemical and manufacturing industries. He previously served as President and CEO of Lithium Americas Corp. (now Lithium Americas (Argentina) Corp.) and has held executive roles at FMC Corporation and Arysta LifeScience.

executives.name: John Kanellitsas
executives.background: Mr. Kanellitsas has over 30 years of experience in the investment banking and asset management industries. He is the Executive Vice Chairman of Lithium Americas Corp.

board_of_directors.name: Aubrey Eveleigh
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Eveleigh has over 30 years of experience in the mineral exploration industry. He was a co-founder of the predecessor Lithium Americas Corp. and has served in various executive capacities.

board_of_directors.name: George Ireland
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Ireland has over 40 years of experience in the mining and financial sectors. He is the founder, CEO and CIO of Geologic Resource Partners LLC.

board_of_directors.name: Jinhee Magie
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Magie is the CFO and Senior Vice President of Lundin Mining Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: Kelvin Dushnisky
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Dushnisky was the CEO of AngloGold Ashanti Ltd. and President of Barrick Gold Corporation.
